home.heroSubline: The first AI-Protected C2C marketplace in the Gulf. Human-written listings, safer chat, trust you can feel.

marketplace.greeting: Welcome — what are you looking for?
marketplace.greetingNamed: Hi {name} — what are you looking for today?
marketplace.heroSubline: Ask in your own words. Dealo understands Gulf dialect.

meta.title: Dealo Hub — AI-Protected C2C Marketplace for the Gulf
meta.description: Buy and sell from people in Kuwait and the Gulf. Private chat, human-written listings, AI fraud protection.

hero.subline: Human-written listings. Private chat — no exposed phone numbers. AI fraud protection. Launching in Kuwait, then the Gulf.

waitlist.sellerCheckbox: I'd like to sell at launch
waitlist.privacyNote: We'll only email you when we launch. Never shared.
waitlist.alreadyOnList: You're already on the list — thanks for your interest.
waitlist.successDetail: We'll notify you the moment we launch — expect a message within 4-6 weeks.
waitlist.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
waitlist.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

trust.heading: Three pillars that set us apart
trust.subheading: Every product decision serves one principle: trust first.

chat.title: Private chat — no phone number
chat.description: Phone numbers stay hidden. All conversations happen in-app via structured chat. No WhatsApp spam, no harassment.
chat.vsCompetitor: Instead of your number being public to every visitor on OpenSooq or Dubizzle.

ai.title: AI-Protected marketplace
ai.description: Every listing passes 5 AI safety checks before going live: authentic photos, clean text, reasonable pricing, no duplicates, verified seller.
ai.vsCompetitor: The first C2C platform in the Gulf with proactive AI protection for both buyer and seller.

human.title: Human-written listings
human.description: AI helps with categorization and pricing — but YOU write the description. Every listing reflects the seller's own voice.
human.vsCompetitor: Instead of machine-generated listings that all sound identical.

categories.heading: 10 focused categories — not 50 empty ones
categories.subheading: We focus on markets with real demand and room for better UX — rather than opening everything and becoming another generic classifieds site.
categories.footnote: Starred (★) categories are our launch priority — electronics, furniture, luxury, baby & kids.

publishSuccess.title: Your listing is live — well, almost.
publishSuccess.subtitle: We’ve saved it as a draft. Our AI safety checks will publish it within minutes.

electronicsHub.metaDescription: Buy and sell phones, laptops, TVs, gaming, smart watches, and cameras across the GCC — every spec verified, every battery disclosed, every device uniquely registered.
electronicsHub.headline: Every spec verified. Every battery disclosed.
electronicsHub.subline: The GCC's trust-first tech marketplace. Catalog-picked models, battery health disclosed, purchase source verified, no counterfeits.
electronicsHub.placeholderClassic: Search by brand, model, or keyword…
electronicsHub.placeholderAI: Try "iPhone under 200 KWD" or "gaming laptop for school"
electronicsHub.typesSubline: Six device families. Every one captured as structured data, not free-text chaos.
electronicsHub.trustSubline: Four structural trust layers. Each one designed to answer the question every buyer asks before they part with cash.

catalog.title: Catalog-picked models
catalog.body: Sellers pick from a canonical device list. No made-up titles, no wrong storage sizes.

imei.title: IMEI registered
imei.body: Every device has a unique-on-Dealo serial. A device sold once can't be relisted without the prior seller releasing it.

battery.title: Battery health, structured
battery.body: Green ≥ 85%, amber 70-84%, red < 70%. Smart watches require it. Phones and laptops are nudged.

provenance.title: Purchase source disclosed
provenance.body: Apple Store · X-cite · Eureka · Sharaf DG · Jarir · carrier · imported. You see where it came from.

electronicsHub.trustFootnote: Dealo doesn't ship counterfeit. Sixteen trigger terms (Arabic + English) are rejected at submit.

tradeIn.pitch: Sell your phone, laptop, or watch in minutes. We quote you now, you confirm at pickup. No haggling, no flake.
tradeIn.disclosureTail: AI-graded. Final pickup inspection adjusts ±10% max.

liveFeed.title: Happening now
liveFeed.subline: Fresh listings, price drops, and trade-in offers from across the GCC.

articles.title: How to buy tech safely
articles.article1Title: How to verify an IMEI at handover
articles.article1Excerpt: Before you hand over cash, pull the phone's IMEI with *#06# and check it at any Zain, STC, Ooredoo, du, or Etisalat branch. Takes 2 minutes, saves you from a bricked device.
articles.article2Title: Battery health — green, amber, or red?
articles.article2Excerpt: iPhone at 86% is strong. At 78% it's fine but aging. Below 70% you're looking at a near-term battery swap. Here's how to read the number — and when to walk away.
articles.article3Excerpt: Device-for-device trades are a GCC staple, but they're also where most scams happen. Use this 5-step checklist to protect both sides before money or devices change hands.

electronicsHub.emptyBody: Be the first seller. Your listing lands on every buyer's feed within seconds.

electronicsDetail.batteryUndisclosed: Battery health not disclosed. Request a screenshot before committing.
electronicsDetail.imeiHelp: Verify the full number at handover against any authorized operator or service centre.
electronicsDetail.imeiUniqueBadge: Unique on Dealo — this device has no duplicate active listing.
electronicsDetail.trustPanelImported: Imported / grey-market — local warranty does not apply
electronicsDetail.repairHint: Honest disclosure builds trust. Sellers can declare whether each component is original or replaced.
electronicsDetail.tradeAcceptedGeneric: Seller is open to a device-for-device trade. Offer your device in chat.

tips: Meet in a safe public place

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.upload_failed: Avatar upload failed. Try a smaller or different image.
errors.avatar_too_large: Avatar must be 2 MB or smaller.

category.title: What are you listing?
category.subtitle: Pick the category that fits best. You can narrow it with a sub-category.

media.title: Add your photos
media.subtitle: Upload 5 to 10 clear shots (8 minimum for luxury). First photo is the cover.

details.title: Describe what you’re selling
details.subtitle: A good title + an honest description earn trust and sell faster.

price.title: How much are you asking?
price.subtitle: Pick a price mode so buyers know whether to negotiate.

location.title: Pickup location
location.subtitle: Buyers will see the general area — never your exact address.

delivery.title: How will you hand it over?
delivery.subtitle: Pick one or more options that work for you.

authenticity.title: Confirm authenticity
authenticity.subtitle: Luxury listings require a seller guarantee and an inspection video.

preview.title: Looks good?
preview.subtitle: Take one last look before your listing goes live.

services.section1Body: One type per listing. For multiple types, create separate listings.
services.section2Body: Clear pricing. "Call for quote" not allowed.
services.section3Body: Pick one or more. Area-level filters come from your profile later.
services.section4Body: Team size + experience + languages. Helps buyers know what to expect.
services.suppliesIncluded: Cleaning supplies / tools included in price
services.section5Body: Rough window — exact slots get locked in chat.
services.section6Body: Short title + clear description that helps buyers decide.
services.titlePlaceholder: e.g. One-off deep cleans — Maryam Al-Sabah
services.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your experience, what the price includes, and when you're available.
services.section7Body: Dealo is not a licensing body. These are self-attestations; you are legally responsible.
services.attest1: I confirm I am NOT a sponsored domestic worker under Kuwait Law 68/2015, OR I have written consent from my sponsor to offer services through this platform.
services.attest2: I confirm I am authorized to offer this service in Kuwait — either as a licensed commercial entity (MOCI), or as an individual offering non-regulated task work.
services.errDescriptionShort: Description is too short (30 chars minimum).
services.errHourlyRequired: Hourly rate and minimum hours are required.
services.errHybridRequired: Hybrid (hourly + fixed) needs all three fields.
services.errAttestationsRequired: Both legal attestations are required to publish.

media.headline: Add {min} to {max} photos
media.help: PNG, JPG, or WebP. Up to 5 MB each. Clear, daylight shots sell fastest.
media.requirements: You need at least {min} photos to continue.
media.requirementsLuxury: Luxury listings need at least {min} photos + an inspection video.

video.headline: Luxury inspection video (30–120 s)
video.help: Walk around the item. Show any serial numbers, stitching, or engravings close up.

details.titlePlaceholder: e.g. iPhone 14 Pro Max 256GB space black
details.titleHint: 5–120 characters. Include the brand and model for easy search.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: What makes this item a great buy? Mention condition, age, what comes with it.
details.descriptionHint: Up to 5000 characters. Be honest — it builds trust and repeat buyers.

q1.title: What are you selling?
q1.subtitle: Pick your exact model from the catalog. No typing.
q1.emptyHint: No match. Don't worry — pick "Other" and describe it in the next step.

q2.title: Where did you buy it?
q2.subtitle: The purchase source sets the buyer's warranty expectation. Tap one.

q3.title: How does it look?
q3.subtitle: Tap the card that best matches your device today.

gradeDescription.excellent: Tiny micro-scratches, only visible close up.
gradeDescription.good: Scratches visible at arm's length, screen clean.
gradeDescription.fair: Dents or scratches on body, still fully functional.

q4.title: How's the battery?
q4.subtitle: Open Settings and enter the percentage below. We'll show a colour bar on the listing.
q4.helpLaptop: macOS: System Information → Power. Windows: powercfg /batteryreport.
q4.helpWatch: Apple Watch: Settings → Battery → Battery Health
q4.notApplicable: This device doesn't have a battery

q5.title: Any repairs?
q5.subtitle: For each part, pick what's true. Honest disclosure is rewarded on Dealo.

q6.title: Warranty & receipt
q6.subtitle: These are optional but boost buyer trust fast.
q6.receiptLabel: Do you have the original receipt?
q6.receiptHint: Image or PDF. You can share it privately in chat if you prefer.

q7.title: Open to a trade?
q7.subtitle: Some buyers prefer to swap their device + cash difference.

imei.label: IMEI / serial — last 4 digits
imei.helpIphone: iPhone: Settings → General → About → scroll to IMEI. Or dial *#06#.
imei.helpAndroid: Samsung/Android: Settings → About phone → IMEI. Or dial *#06#.
imei.helpLaptop: Laptop: the sticker on the bottom shows the serial. Or look in About This Mac / System Info.
imei.helpWatch: Apple Watch: Settings → General → About → Serial Number.
imei.privacyNote: We store it hashed, never the full number. Buyers verify in person at handover.
imei.checkClean: Clean — this device has no duplicate on Dealo.
imei.checkBlocked: Already listed on Dealo by another seller. Can't proceed.
imei.checkOwnListing: You already have this device listed. Remove the old listing first.
imei.skipWarning: We'll add a "verification pending" note to your listing.

photoHints.title: Suggested photos
photoHints.body: Not required — buyers just trust your listing more when they see these.
phone: Settings → About → IMEI (can blur the full number)
laptop: Device powered on (login screen or desktop)
Sticker on the bottom showing serial

review.title: Review & continue
review.subtitle: Check your answers. You can still edit any field.

price.priceHint: Kuwaiti Dinar. You can change this later.
price.minOfferHint: Optional — buyers won’t see this number; offers below it are auto-rejected.

location.areaHint: Buyers see the area, never your exact address.

authenticity.headline: Authenticity matters for luxury
authenticity.subheadline: A short statement + optional proof gives buyers confidence — and protects you from disputes.
authenticity.statementHeadline: I guarantee this item is authentic
authenticity.statementBody: I accept a full return within 7 days of delivery if the item is proven non-authentic.
authenticity.receiptLabel: I have a receipt / original invoice
authenticity.receiptHint: You can share it privately in chat later.
authenticity.serialHint: Adds a “Serial on file” trust signal.

preview.validationFailed: Some fields need attention before publishing

stub.title: Step coming in the next session
stub.subtitle: This step of the wizard isn’t wired up yet. The first step (category) is fully functional — return to it below.

like_new.label: Like new
like_new.description: Used once or twice — looks new.

fair_used.label: Fair used
fair_used.description: Used, visible wear, still fully functional.

negotiable.label: Negotiable
negotiable.description: Open to reasonable offers in chat.

best_offer.label: Best offer
best_offer.description: Buyers submit offers; you pick the one that works.

pickup.label: Pickup
pickup.description: Buyer meets you at an agreed location.

seller_delivers.label: I deliver
seller_delivers.description: You’ll deliver to the buyer’s area.

buyer_ships.label: Buyer ships
buyer_ships.description: Buyer arranges and pays for shipping.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.save_failed: We couldn’t save your draft — please try again.
errors.upload_failed: Upload failed. Try a smaller or different file.
errors.too_large: File is too large. Max 12 MB per source image.
errors.invalid_format: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP files are allowed.
errors.video_invalid_format: Only MP4, WebM, or MOV videos are allowed.
errors.video_too_large: Video must be 50 MB or smaller.
errors.video_metadata_unreadable: We couldn’t read this video’s duration — try re-encoding.
errors.title_too_short: Title must be at least 5 characters.
errors.description_too_short: Description must be at least 10 characters.
errors.phone_not_allowed_in_text: Phone numbers aren’t allowed in the title or description — buyers will chat with you in-app.
errors.counterfeit_term_not_allowed: Luxury listings can’t mention “1st copy”, “replica”, or similar.
errors.min_offer_only_for_best_offer: Minimum offer is only allowed with “Best offer”.
errors.min_offer_must_be_less_than_price: Minimum offer must be lower than the price.
errors.delivery_required: Pick at least one delivery option.
errors.authenticity_required: You must confirm authenticity to publish luxury listings.
errors.images_too_few: You need more photos to continue.
errors.images_too_many: Too many photos — 10 is the max.
errors.video_required: Luxury listings need an inspection video.
errors.no_draft: We couldn’t find your draft — start a new listing.
errors.insert_failed: Couldn’t publish the listing — please try again.
errors.not_implemented_yet_session2: Publish not wired up yet — coming soon.

hero.headline: Real sellers. Real verified listings.
hero.subline: Every listing verified by AI and humans. Sell with trust, buy with confidence — across the Gulf.

ai.headline: Every deal, verified.
ai.subline: A four-layer safety net runs on every listing and every chat — so you spend time picking what to buy, not checking if it is real.
ai.reassurance: AI outputs reviewed by humans · Human reviewers trained monthly · Protection runs on every request, not on launch day

verification.title: Listing verification
verification.desc: Every ad passes an AI first-line review, then a human spot-check before it goes live. No bots, no duplicates.

image.title: Image intelligence
image.desc: Reverse-matched against stolen-photo databases. Blurred plates, staged shots and reused stock get flagged.

scam.title: Scam shield
scam.desc: Off-platform payment asks, phishing patterns and price anomalies trigger real-time warnings in chat.

semantic.title: Semantic search
semantic.desc: Type like you speak — "reliable family car under 80k" — our embeddings understand intent, not just keywords.

feed.headline: Fresh from our partners
feed.subline: A curated snapshot of the latest premium listings from verified dealers and developers across the Gulf.

footerSite.tagline: Premium C2C marketplace for the Gulf. Every listing verified by AI + humans — sell with trust, buy with confidence.
footerSite.newsletterNote: Weekly pulse on pricing, drops, and new verified listings. No spam.

hero.title: Rides for every road — and every harbor.
hero.subtitle: Cars, bikes, boats, trucks, campers and more — every listing verified by AI and humans, across the Gulf.
hero.placeholderAI: Try "family car under 80k" or "fishing boat under 10k"

ad.title: Sell your ride 3× faster with Dealo Pro.
ad.subtitle: Boosted placement, AI-optimized copy, verified badge from day one, and direct buyer chat — all in one plan for serious sellers.

best.title: The year's best rides, chosen by us.

sponsoredCard.headline: Drive home today. 0% APR for 60 months on certified pre-owned.

detail.eligibilityKuwaitiBody: Kuwait Law 74 of 1979 restricts ownership of this property class to Kuwaiti nationals. Non-Kuwaiti buyers can rent, not buy.
detail.eligibilityGccBody: GCC nationals may own this property subject to reciprocity rules. Non-GCC expats: rental-only.
detail.eligibilityOpenBody: This listing has no residency restriction. Verify local tax + transfer rules with a licensed agent.

hero.headline: Every home verified. Every chalet bookable.
hero.subline: Kuwait's first AI-protected property marketplace. Law-74 clarity, Dealo-inspected listings, chalet booking primitives, and structured diwaniya — absent on every other platform.

hero.placeholderAI: Try "3-bed apartment in Salmiya under 500 KWD"

types.title: Pick your property
types.subline: 14 property types, mapped to how Kuwait actually shops.

featured.title: Hand-picked by our inspection team
featured.subline: Listings that pass our full trust audit — timestamped photos, verified deeds, inspected in person. No 'Non-Arabs Only' wording. No 1-KWD bait. No hidden fees.

grid.title: All properties
grid.emptyBody: Try widening the sub-category or type selection.

financeBanner.pitch: See exactly what you can afford in 60 seconds. Sharia-compliant, no early-payment penalties, instant pre-approval letter you can show sellers.
financeBanner.disclosureTail: Indicative. Final approval subject to KFH credit policy.

trustStrip.title: Why Dealo Properties
trustStrip.subline: Five things Dubizzle doesn't do in Kuwait.
trustStrip.pillar1Body: Every sale listing shows whether non-Kuwaitis can legally own. No wasted conversations.
trustStrip.pillar2Body: Filter C rejects 'Only for X' at submit. Observed live on Dubizzle; blocked here.
trustStrip.pillar3Body: Separate entrance? Private bathroom? Kitchenette? Each filterable — not buried in free text.
trustStrip.pillar4Body: Seasonal multipliers, weekend premiums, check-in times. Dubizzle has 9 chalet rentals total.
trustStrip.pillar5Body: Physically inspected listings carry a timestamped verification badge. Auditable.

developers.title: Trusted names, inspected listings
developers.subline: Developers whose units have been physically audited by our team.

articles.title: Know before you buy
articles.article1Title: Law 74: what non-Kuwaitis can and can't own
articles.article1Excerpt: Every expat's first question, answered without the legalese. Residency, investment zones, the rare exceptions.
articles.article2Title: Chalet buying guide: Bnaider vs Khairan vs Sabah Al-Ahmad
articles.article2Excerpt: The three coastal tiers, how they differ in plot economics, and which is right for weekend rental income.
articles.article3Title: Cheques count: how to negotiate 12 down to 4
articles.article3Excerpt: Kuwait's cheque system is negotiable more than tenants realise. The framework that works without losing the unit.

liveFeed.title: Just listed in Kuwait
liveFeed.subline: Fresh listings updated in real time. Tap any card to see the full detail.

inbox.title: Messages
inbox.subtitle: Chat with buyers and sellers. Your phone number stays private — always.
inbox.emptyActiveBody: Browse a listing and tap 'Contact seller' to start your first conversation.
inbox.emptyArchivedBody: Threads you archive will appear here.

thread.emptyThreadBody: Say hello — sellers respond faster when the first message is specific (mention availability, condition, or a price question).
thread.phoneRemovedNotice: We don't share phone numbers on Dealo Hub. Keep it in chat.
thread.blockedBanner: You've blocked this conversation. Unblock to resume chat.
thread.theyBlockedBanner: The other party has blocked this conversation.

errors.not_authenticated: Please sign in to send messages.
errors.validation_failed: Message can't be empty or too long (max 2000 chars).
errors.phone_not_allowed: Phone numbers aren't allowed in chat. Please describe availability instead.
errors.discriminatory_not_allowed: Please describe the property or item, not who can contact you.
errors.listing_not_live: This listing is no longer active.
errors.own_listing: You can't chat with yourself on your own listing.
errors.start_failed: Couldn't start the conversation. Try again.
errors.send_failed: Couldn't send your message. Try again.
errors.not_a_participant: You're not part of this conversation.
errors.rate_limited: Slow down — you're sending messages too fast. Try again in a minute.

servicesHub.heroTitle: Verified providers. Real quotes. No spam calls.
servicesHub.heroSubtitle: Cleaning + handyman tasks from identity-verified individual providers. Transparent prices, chat-only contact, reviews after the job is done.
servicesHub.placeholderClassic: Search by task, location, or provider…
servicesHub.trustSubline: Four platform-level protections. Built so you never have to wonder if the person at your door is who they said they were.
servicesHub.trust1Body: Every provider passes civil-ID + phone OTP. Higher tier for MOCI-licensed businesses.
servicesHub.trust2Body: No phone number ever exposed. All quotes, bookings, and messaging stay inside Dealo.
servicesHub.trust3Body: Both sides must confirm the job is done before a review can be left. No spam stars.
servicesHub.trust4Body: If the whole booking stays in Dealo chat, we stand behind it with a KD 200 capped guarantee on disputes.

provider.title: About the provider
provider.attestationsBody: Provider attested compliance with Kuwait Law 68/2015 (domestic labor) + authorization to offer the service. These are self-attestations — Dealo is not a licensing body.

reviews.title: Customer reviews
reviews.emptyBody: Reviews only unlock after both sides confirm the job is done. A new provider means no completed jobs yet.

purchase.quoteFlowBody: Next update — answer 4 quick questions and 3 providers send structured quotes within 24 hours.
purchase.guaranteeBody: Keep the conversation inside Dealo and we stand behind disputes up to KD 200.
purchase.chatOnlyNote: Phone number + email never shown. All contact stays inside the secure chat.

bookingProposal.title: Booking Proposal
bookingProposal.guarantee: Protected by Dealo Guarantee as long as all contact stays inside Dealo.

queue.title: Moderation queue
queue.body: {count, plural, =0 {No listings waiting for review.} one {# listing waiting for review.} other {# listings waiting for review.}}

header.title: Dashboard Overview
header.subtitle: A summary for all the purchases, sales etc.

listings.title: Listings
listings.subtitle: Approve, hold, or reject listings awaiting moderation.

reject.titleBulk: Reject {count, plural, one {# listing} other {# listings}}
reject.bodySingle: Share a brief reason for rejecting "{title}". The seller will see it.
reject.bodyBulk: Share a brief reason. The same note will be attached to every selected listing.
reject.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Misleading title, duplicate listing, prohibited item…

a11y.selectAll: Select all listings on this page

errors.bulkPartial: {ok} succeeded, {fail} failed. Try the failed items again.
errors.reasonTooShort: Please provide a short reason (at least 3 characters).
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.invalidInput: The request was rejected. Please check the input.
errors.rpcFailed: The action failed. Please try again.
